notableEvents.label: Cole Young plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Cole Young hit by pitch. Jhonny Pereda to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Chase Meidroth. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Emerson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colt Emerson grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Colt Emerson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder flies out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters grounds into a force out, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson. Chase Meidroth scores. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters grounds into a force out, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson. Chase Meidroth scores. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth picked off and caught stealing home, catcher Jhonny Pereda to third baseman Patrick Wisdom to catcher Jhonny Pereda. Tristan Peters to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters grounds into a force out, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop Colt Emerson. Chase Meidroth scores. Jarred Kelenic out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
